## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] Changes in this PR are scoped to one feature or fix.
- [ ] If this is gameplay feature work, this PR does **not** mix in unrelated tooling/agent metadata changes (for example: `.serena/**`, `.claude/**`, local MCP/playwright artifacts, or unrelated Copilot/agent bootstrap files).
- [ ] Tests/docs were updated when behavior or contracts changed.
- [ ] Any intentionally deferred work is called out in this PR description.
